description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the elixir:1.12-alpine Docker image with a postgres:alpine service. Set the variables MIX_ENV to test and POSTGRES_PASSWORD to postgres. In the before_script run apk --update-cache add postgresql-client build-base gcc abuild binutils, then mix local.rebar --force, mix local.hex --force, mix deps.get, and mix ecto.reset. Add a test job in the test stage that runs mix test. The pipeline has no caches, artifacts, or conditional rules.
